# Habit Tracker, Routine Planner · Habit Tracker

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:08 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 2, 2026 - Jul 3, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Juan Vasquez_, Jul 3, 2026, 1/5: "Upon subscribing for $30/year, it gives a warning premium features are going away soon and you need to make ANOTHER purchase in app. What features?! it's so basic. So many bugs as well, no notifications, text doesn't fit in the apps buttons (selection option text are cut off)."
            2. _Jan_, Mar 2, 2026, 1/5: "Full of bugs and strange placement of settings. Everything is spread across the app, nothing is practical in any way. The app freezes if you minimize it during the timer. Complete junk for a lot of money. Updates? Improvements? Nothing is happening here! Shame on you! Now you are also spammed with advertising. as a paying customer! Contacting support by email doesn't help either. NPCs without brains."
            3. _Joel Santiago Barragan Sanchez_, Jun 26, 2026, 2/5: "The app is amazing in its concept, the routines are extremely easy to create and its amazing for us who have trouble concentrating. But the app is unusable rigth now because of how buggy it is, sometimes routines alarms dont go on, or the app simplt refises to start."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 21, 2026 - Jul 1, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ryan M_, Jul 1, 2026, 1/5: "It says there's a 7 day trial, but I was charged before I've even had a chance to try it. If I try to cancel, it says I'm stuck for the year. Not cool."
            2. _Orla Raulerson_, May 21, 2026, 2/5: "had it before there was no trial no money deleted it for space redowload to find out i have to pay 30 bucks a month when it was free there was no reason for it to be payed now i have to find a routine tracker that will hold three of my routines"

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      1 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: May 29, 2026 - May 29, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Liz_, May 29, 2026, 5/5: "It doesn't shove ads, premium or AI down your throat. It is clean, allows repeating tasks without premium thus far and doesn't add unnecessary emojis to your previously written tasks. Good for organized people who have divergent brains."
